name: Context Bridge
tagline: Unified continuity system for OpenClaw - registries, discovery, and model handoff
description: Context Bridge ensures context persists across sessions, models, and time. It prevents 'starting from zero' on every /new or model switch. Provides four core components: Registries (track skills, crons, agents), Discovery (skill capabilities), Handoff Memory (what previous models did), and SOPs (rules to prevent duplication).

binaries.notes: setup.sh requires jq for JSON manipulation. openclaw CLI is optional but enables auto-discovery of crons and agents.
